description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a short-sleeved, vertically striped sports jersey with a number and name on the back, paired with casual pants that have side pockets and fitted cuffs. The figure stands with arms slightly outstretched, displaying a relaxed but alert posture. He wears low-top athletic sneakers and has a distinctive hairstyle with long hair tied up in a high ponytail. The facial features are defined, and the figure has a well-proportioned build typical of an active adult. The jersey is styled in a way reminiscent of soccer uniforms, suggesting a sporty or casual urban context. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and modern.
description: An adult male in a striped sports jersey, casual pants, and sneakers, with a high ponytail and a sporty, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped jersey, facial features, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, ponytail, and the fit of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the name and number on the jersey, ponytail, and back of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and side details of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved sports jersey and casual jogger pants with side pockets
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied in a high ponytail
